attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
            BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT,
            BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT, 
	        BK_COMPANY_CD,
			SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
			VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY,
			DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
			DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
			DV_USD_AMT,
			APPLICATION_VERSION_CD,
			BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
			VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT,
			TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
FROM
(			
	SELECT    
                  STMJL.JE_HEADER_ID AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT 
                 ,STMJL.JE_LINE_NUM AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
                 ,STMJL.DD_BK_COMPANY_CD AS BK_COMPANY_CD                 
                 ,STMJL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                 ,STMJL.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY AS VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY
                 ,STMJL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  
				 ,COALesce(NJEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT,0)- COALESCE(NJEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT,0) AS JEL_USD_AMT
	             ,COALesce(NJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0)- COALESCE(NJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0) AS JEL_FUNC_AMT
	             ,COALesce(NJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0)- COALESCE(NJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0) AS JEL_TX_AMT
	             ,CASE WHEN COALESCE(STMJL.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT,0)= COALESCE(JEL_TX_AMT,0) THEN 1
					   WHEN STMJL.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT <> 0 AND JEL_TX_AMT <>0 THEN CAST(STMJL.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT/JEL_TX_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
					   ELSE 0
                   END  AS DIST_RATIO
                 ,COALesce(JEL_FUNC_AMT,0) *   DIST_RATIO  AS DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
                 ,COALesce(JEL_USD_AMT,0) *   DIST_RATIO  AS DV_USD_AMT         
                 ,'12i' AS APPLICATION_VERSION_CD
                 ,STMJL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
                 ,STMJL.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT          
                 ,STMJL.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD 				 
		FROM $$STGDB.WI_JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_12I STMJL              
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			ON 	STMJL.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		/*  9/21/2011 Bedrock2.0 change : Added Join with JE_HEADERS */
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY NJE
			ON (STMJL.JE_HEADER_ID = NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
			AND NJE.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
			ON 	STMJL.JE_HEADER_ID      = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
			AND STMJL.JE_LINE_NUM       = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT
			AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NJEL.SS_CD
			AND STMJL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  =  NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY /* Added for P2R SLA changes to bring in only Primary Ledger data */ 
		/*  9/21/2011 Bedrock2.0 change : Added WHERE condition to eliminate any Journal Entries which was created in SJ and copied over to CFN */
		WHERE
		( NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME  not  like 'SJ%' and  NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME  not like 'CG%' )
) A

SELECT
      NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT,
      NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT ,
      NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CD,
      NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,
      NJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
      SMFOM.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE,
      SMFOM.REFERENCE_2,
      SMFOM.REFERENCE_3,
      NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD,
      NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY,
      COALESCE(NJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0) - COALESCE( NJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0)  AS DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,  
      COALESCE(NJEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT,0) - COALESCE(NJEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT,0)  AS DV_USD_AMT ,        
      '11i' AS APPLICATION_VERSION_CD,
      NJEL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE   AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
      COALESCE(NJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0) - COALESCE(NJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0) AS DV_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
      NJE.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
FROM 
(
      SELECT 
             GLOBAL_NAME ,
             SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
             JE_HEADER_ID,
             JE_LINE_NUM,
             CAST(REFERENCE_2 AS INTEGER) REFERENCE_2,
             REFERENCE_3,
             REFERENCE_6,
             ACTION_CODE
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_JE_LINES
      WHERE REFERENCE_6 = 'AP Invoices'
      AND REFERENCE_2 IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCE_3 IS NOT NULL
      AND STATUS='P' 
	  /*  9/21/2011 Bedrock2.0 change : replaced global_name ='US' with 'BE' */
	  AND GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
     UNION ALL
      SELECT 
             GLOBAL_NAME ,
             SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
             JE_HEADER_ID,
             JE_LINE_NUM,
             CAST(REFERENCE_2  AS INTEGER) REFERENCE_2,
             REFERENCE_3,
             REFERENCE_6,
             ACTION_CODE
      FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_GL_JE_LINES_VNDR_INVOICE 
	  WHERE 
	  /*  9/21/2011 Bedrock2.0 change : replaced global_name ='US' with 'BE' */
	  GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
      and  REFERENCE_6 = 'AP Invoices'
      AND REFERENCE_2 IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCE_3 IS NOT NULL
)SMFOM 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON(SMFOM.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY NJE
	ON (SMFOM.JE_HEADER_ID = NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT 
	AND NJE.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
	ON (SMFOM.JE_HEADER_ID = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT 
	AND SMFOM.JE_LINE_NUM = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
	AND NJEL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND NJEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'INVOICE JOURNAL ENTRY LINE' ) 
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI
	ON(SMFOM.REFERENCE_2 = NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT 
	AND NVI.SS_CD = 'MFG' ) /* 9/21/2011 Bedrock2.0 change: Hardcode 'MFG' (earlier NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NVI.SS_CD) */
/*  9/21/2011 Bedrock2.0 change : Added WHERE condition to pull only Journal Entries which are created in SJ and copied over to CFN */
WHERE
NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME  like 'SJ%'

SELECT
     WGJLVI.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT,
      WGJLVI.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT ,
      WGJLVI.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CD,
      WGJLVI.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,
      NVID.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY,
      WGJLVI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
       WGJLVI.DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,  
 WGJLVI.DV_USD_AMT ,        
 WGJLVI.APPLICATION_VERSION_CD,
 WGJLVI.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
 WGJLVI.DV_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 WGJLVI.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD   ,
      WGJLVI.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_JE_LINES_VNDR_INVOICE WGJLVI
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION NVID
	ON(   NVID.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY = WGJLVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY 
	AND  NVID.BK_INV_DISTRIB_LINE_NUM_INT = WGJLVI.REFERENCE_3 
	AND NVID.SS_CD = 'MFG' )  /* 9/21/2011 Bedrock2.0 change: Hardcode 'MFG' (earlier NVID.SS_CD = WGJLVI.SS_CD) */

SELECT 
 BATCH_ID                      
,ACCOUNTED_CR                  
,ACCOUNTED_DR                  
,CREATED_BY                    
,CREATION_DATE                 
,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,EFFECTIVE_DATE                
,ENTERED_CR                    
,ENTERED_DR                    
,INVOICE_AMOUNT                
,INVOICE_DATE                  
,INVOICE_IDENTIFIER            
,JE_HEADER_ID                  
,JE_LINE_NUM                   
,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,PERIOD_NAME                   
,REFERENCE_2                   
,REFERENCE_3                   
,REFERENCE_6                   
,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE    
,REFERENCE_7
,REFERENCE_8
FROM
(  
	SELECT 
		 BATCH_ID                      
		,ACCOUNTED_CR                  
		,ACCOUNTED_DR                  
		,CREATED_BY                    
		,CREATION_DATE                 
		,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
		,EFFECTIVE_DATE                
		,ENTERED_CR                    
		,ENTERED_DR                    
		,INVOICE_AMOUNT                
		,INVOICE_DATE                  
		,INVOICE_IDENTIFIER            
		,JE_HEADER_ID                  
		,JE_LINE_NUM                   
		,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,PERIOD_NAME                   
		,REFERENCE_2                   
		,REFERENCE_3                   
		,REFERENCE_6                   
		,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
		,GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,CREATE_DATETIME               
		,ACTION_CODE   
		,REFERENCE_7
		,REFERENCE_8		
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_JE_LINES
	WHERE  GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
	AND STATUS='P'
)STMOJEL 
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_JEL_SRC_LNK_FRM_VNDR_INVOICE WJEL,
               $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
				$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   WHERE   WJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT =STMOJEL.JE_LINE_NUM 
   AND   WJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT = STMOJEL.JE_HEADER_ID 
   AND   WJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   AND   NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMOJEL.GLOBAL_NAME
   AND   NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
)
/*  9/21/2011 Bedrock2.0 change : commented GLOBAL_NAME ='US' flow */
/*
UNION ALL
SELECT 
 BATCH_ID                      
,ACCOUNTED_CR                  
,ACCOUNTED_DR                  
,CREATED_BY                    
,CREATION_DATE                 
,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,EFFECTIVE_DATE                
,ENTERED_CR                    
,ENTERED_DR                    
,INVOICE_AMOUNT                
,INVOICE_DATE                  
,INVOICE_IDENTIFIER            
,JE_HEADER_ID                  
,JE_LINE_NUM                   
,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,PERIOD_NAME                   
,REFERENCE_2                   
,REFERENCE_3                   
,REFERENCE_6                   
,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE    
FROM
(  
	SELECT 
		 BATCH_ID                      
		,ACCOUNTED_CR                  
		,ACCOUNTED_DR                  
		,CREATED_BY                    
		,CREATION_DATE                 
		,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
		,EFFECTIVE_DATE                
		,ENTERED_CR                    
		,ENTERED_DR                    
		,INVOICE_AMOUNT                
		,INVOICE_DATE                  
		,INVOICE_IDENTIFIER            
		,JE_HEADER_ID                  
		,JE_LINE_NUM                   
		,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,PERIOD_NAME                   
		,REFERENCE_2                   
		,REFERENCE_3                   
		,REFERENCE_6                   
		,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
		,GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,CREATE_DATETIME               
		,ACTION_CODE                             
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_JE_LINES
	WHERE REFERENCE_6 = 'AP Invoices'
	AND REFERENCE_2 IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCE_3 IS NOT NULL
	AND STATUS='P' AND GLOBAL_NAME='US'
)STMOJEL 
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_JEL_SRC_LNK_FRM_VNDR_INVOICE WJEL,
               $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
				$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   WHERE   WJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT =STMOJEL.JE_LINE_NUM 
   AND   WJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT = STMOJEL.JE_HEADER_ID 
   AND   WJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   AND   NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMOJEL.GLOBAL_NAME
   AND   NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
)
*/

SELECT
            BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
            BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT, 
	        BK_COMPANY_CD,
			SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
			VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY,
			DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
			DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
			DV_USD_AMT,
			APPLICATION_VERSION_CD,
			BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
			VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT,
			TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
FROM
(			
	SELECT    
                  WIJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
                 ,WIJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
                 ,WIJEL.BK_COMPANY_CD AS BK_COMPANY_CD                 
                 ,WIJEL.GL_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                 ,WIJEL.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY AS VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY
                 ,WIJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  
				 ,COALesce(NJEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT,0)- COALESCE(NJEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT,0) AS JEL_USD_AMT
	             ,COALesce(NJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0)- COALESCE(NJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0) AS JEL_FUNC_AMT
	             ,COALesce(NJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0)- COALESCE(NJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0) AS JEL_TX_AMT
	             ,CASE WHEN COALESCE(WIJEL.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT,0)= COALESCE(JEL_TX_AMT,0) THEN 1
					   WHEN WIJEL.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT <> 0 AND JEL_TX_AMT <>0 THEN CAST(WIJEL.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT/JEL_TX_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
					   ELSE 0
                   END  AS DIST_RATIO
                 ,COALesce(JEL_FUNC_AMT,0) *   DIST_RATIO  AS DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
                 ,COALesce(JEL_USD_AMT,0) *   DIST_RATIO  AS DV_USD_AMT         
                 ,'12i' AS APPLICATION_VERSION_CD
                 , NJEL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE as BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD /* JE_LINE Currency*/
                 ,WIJEL.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT          
                 ,WIJEL.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD 				 
		FROM $$STGDB.WI_JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_12i_CG1 WIJEL              
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			ON 	WIJEL.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME /* GL Global_name */
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY NJE
			ON (WIJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT = NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
			AND WIJEL.GL_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NJE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)  /* Joining with GL SOB */
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
			ON 	WIJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT      = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
			AND WIJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT       = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT
			AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NJEL.SS_CD
			AND WIJEL.GL_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  =  NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
			  /* This SOB_KEY is from GL */  
		      /*  LSS Logic  : Added WHERE condition to eliminate any Journal Entries created for in SJ & CFN Invoice records  */
		WHERE
		NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME  like 'CG1%'
) A
